evals.prompt: Build a pricing page for FreyAI Visions. We have two tiers: Setup (3.5k-7.5k EUR one-time) and Retainer (300-500 EUR/month). The brand is 'Industrial Luxury' - think Rolex meets Apple. Dark mode, bold typography, minimalist industrial.
evals.expected_output: A visually striking pricing page with dark theme, distinctive typography (not Inter/Roboto), bold layout, industrial luxury aesthetic, memorable design element

assertions.name: no-generic-fonts
assertions.description: Must NOT use Inter, Roboto, Arial, or system fonts. Must use distinctive, characterful font choices.

assertions.name: dark-theme-executed
assertions.description: Page uses dark background (#09090b or similar), light text, consistent with industrial luxury

assertions.name: no-purple-gradient-slop
assertions.description: Does NOT use the cliched purple-gradient-on-white AI aesthetic

assertions.name: memorable-design-element
assertions.description: Has at least one distinctive, memorable design element (unexpected layout, creative background, unique interaction)

assertions.name: css-variables-used
assertions.description: Uses CSS custom properties for color/spacing consistency

evals.prompt: Create a hero section for the FreyAI landing page. Target audience: German Handwerker (craftsmen). Message: 'Your business deserves premium digital tools.' Include a CTA for booking a demo.
evals.expected_output: Bold hero with industrial luxury aesthetic, creative typography, atmospheric backgrounds, clear CTA, no cookie-cutter layout

assertions.name: bold-aesthetic-direction
assertions.description: Has a clear, intentional aesthetic direction - not a generic template

assertions.name: atmospheric-background
assertions.description: Background uses creative treatment (gradient mesh, texture, pattern, noise) not just solid color

assertions.name: typography-hierarchy
assertions.description: Clear typographic hierarchy with distinctive display font paired with refined body font

assertions.name: meaningful-animation
assertions.description: Includes at least one CSS animation or transition that adds delight

assertions.name: production-grade-code
assertions.description: Code is production-ready: responsive, accessible, clean structure

evals.prompt: Design a dashboard overview card component that shows monthly revenue, open invoices count, and pending quotes. Make it look premium and distinctive.
evals.expected_output: Dashboard cards with unique visual treatment, not generic bootstrap-style cards. Creative use of shadows, borders, or backgrounds.

assertions.name: not-bootstrap-generic
assertions.description: Cards do NOT look like generic Bootstrap/Tailwind template cards

assertions.name: creative-visual-treatment
assertions.description: Uses creative visual treatment: unique shadows, borders, gradients, or textures

assertions.name: responsive-layout
assertions.description: Cards are responsive and work on mobile and desktop

assertions.name: data-formatting
assertions.description: Numbers use proper EUR formatting with locale-aware display

assertions.name: cohesive-aesthetic
assertions.description: All cards share a cohesive aesthetic that feels intentionally designed
